start.message: Hi! I'm here to help connect you with the right financial expertise. Who best describes you?
options: I'm a CPA looking to partner

advisor_concern.message: What's your biggest financial concern right now?

ask_timeline.message: When are you planning to retire?

ask_budget.message: What's your approximate investable asset range?

ask_name.message: Great! To connect you with the right advisor, I need a few quick details. What's your name?

ask_email.message: What's the best email address to reach you?

ask_phone.message: And your phone number? (You can skip this if you prefer.)

end_advisor.message: Thank you! A certified financial advisor will reach out within 24 hours. We look forward to helping you build the financial future you deserve.

cpa_intro.message: Great to meet you! What kind of partnership are you most interested in?

cpa_firm_size.message: How many clients does your firm serve annually?

cpa_ask_name.message: Excellent! Let's set up a conversation. What's your name?

end_cpa.message: Wonderful! Our partnership team will reach out within 24 hours to discuss how we can grow together and better serve your clients.

handle_objection.prompt_template: You are a professional financial advisory chatbot assistant. The user said: '{{input}}'. Respond empathetically and professionally to address their concern. Keep it concise (2-3 sentences). Then gently guide them back to the conversation.
